/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/xmltests.dir/domtestcase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xmltests.dir/xmllayouttest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xmltests.dir/xmllayouttestcase.cpp.o -o xmltests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ianngulube/Documents/Code/cpp/Experimental_2/DistributedATS/build/Log4cxx-prefix/src/Log4cxx-build/src/main/cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libaprutil-1.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libldap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblber.so ../libtestingFramework.a ../util/libtestingUtilities.a ../../../main/cpp/liblog4cxx.so.15.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libapr-1.so
